nodes.title: Get Accounts List
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/accounts. Returns array of accounts for business with balances joined. Requires Authorization header and bizId membership. Returns 200 with [{id, name, accountType, accountNumber, provider, subType, balance, isActive, createdAt}]. Accounts ordered by accountType and name. Returns 401 if unauthorized. Returns 403 if not member of business.

nodes.title: Post Account Create
nodes.description: POST /api/businesses/:bizId/accounts with body {name, accountType, accountNumber, provider, subType, currency, initialBalance}. Validates accountType in allowed list (asset, liability, revenue, expense, equity). Inserts into accounts table and creates initial balance record if initialBalance provided. Returns 201 with created account {id, name, accountType, ...}. Returns 400 if validation fails or accountType invalid. Requires accounts create permission.

nodes.title: Put Account Update
nodes.description: PUT /api/businesses/:bizId/accounts/:id with body fields to update (name, accountNumber, provider, subType, isActive). Validates accountId belongs to business. Cannot change accountType after creation. Updates accounts table. Returns 200 with updated account. Returns 404 if account not found. Returns 403 if account not in business or no permission.

nodes.title: Delete Account
nodes.description: DELETE /api/businesses/:bizId/accounts/:id. Validates ownership then deletes from accounts table (cascade deletes balances and links). Returns 200 with {success: true}. Returns 404 if not found. Returns 403 if not authorized. Returns 400 if account has transactions (cannot delete). Requires accounts delete permission.

nodes.title: Get Account By Id
nodes.description: GET /accounts/:id. Returns single account with balance. Returns 200 with {id, name, accountType, balance, ...}. Returns 404 if not found. Used for lookups when creating vouchers or journal entries.

nodes.title: Get Allowed Links For Account
nodes.description: GET /accounts/:id/allowed-links. Returns array of account IDs that this account can link to based on account_allowed_links table. Returns 200 with [{targetAccountId, targetAccountName}]. Empty array if no links configured. Used for restricting voucher target accounts.

nodes.title: Get Allowed Targets For Account
nodes.description: GET /accounts/:id/allowed-targets. Returns array of valid target accounts for this account based on links or business rules. Returns 200 with [{id, name, accountType}]. Used in voucher form dropdowns to show only valid target accounts.

nodes.title: Post Account Link Create
nodes.description: POST /account-links with body {sourceAccountId, targetAccountId}. Creates allowed link in account_allowed_links table. Validates both accounts exist. Returns 201 with {id, sourceAccountId, targetAccountId}. Returns 400 if accounts invalid or link already exists.

nodes.title: Delete Account Link
nodes.description: DELETE /account-links/:id. Removes link from account_allowed_links table. Returns 200 with {success: true}. Returns 404 if link not found. Returns 400 if linkId invalid.
